selections.name: Head Kahuna
selections.reason: Consistent form with a solid 3rd at Scone recently. Finds a very suitable contest here.

selections.name: Honniball Drive
selections.reason: Well-supported on debut and ran a strong 2nd at Gunnedah. Race experience will prove invaluable.

selections.name: Spellecast
selections.reason: Second run back. Made good headway for 2nd at Walcha previously. Rates highly among these.

selections.name: Flaunter
selections.reason: First starter by Tassort. Trained on the track and latest trial had merit.

danger_horse.name: Oakfield Missouri
danger_horse.reason: Trial winner at Tamworth making debut in a winnable contest.

selections.name: Copperline
selections.reason: Promising type who won by a long-neck at this track last start. Back in fine order and tough to beat.

selections.name: Sobek
selections.reason: Resumes from a spell after a debut win at Taree. Returns with a trial win and commands respect.

selections.name: Third Base
selections.reason: Second run from a spell after a narrow 2nd at Newcastle. Set to peak from the inside barrier.

selections.name: Go Russian
selections.reason: Consistent form, most recently 2nd at Newcastle. Won at Quirindi prior. Place best.

danger_horse.name: Flying Molly
danger_horse.reason: Won at Quirindi two back and can measure up with the right run.

selections.name: Microgravity
selections.reason: Scored a big 5 len win at Port Macquarie in the wet. One of the chief contenders.

selections.name: Dunstall The Gun
selections.reason: Ran on strongly from last on the turn for 2nd at this track. Ready for this trip.

selections.name: Grande Diablo
selections.reason: Useful type worth another chance from the better gate after a win at Tamworth two back.

selections.name: Fortheo
selections.reason: Won at Gunnedah last start. Hard to ignore his Maiden win despite the draw.

danger_horse.name: Sweet Justice
danger_horse.reason: Tracked the speed for 4th at Gunnedah. Rates highly and should run the 1m from the inside gate.

selections.name: Leovanni (NZ)
selections.reason: Second run back. 5th at this track last start and capable of testing these if she can break cleanly.

selections.name: Rockthevelio
selections.reason: Resuming. Placed at Goulburn and Kembla Grange last prep. Might be better off following this outing but has class.

selections.name: Astound Beauty
selections.reason: Resuming after 11 weeks. Primed with two trials and finds a winnable race from the inside.

selections.name: Mako (NZ)
selections.reason: Returns from a let-up. Drops back in class and deserves another chance.

danger_horse.name: Immortal Rose
danger_horse.reason: Resumes after a break. Has been in the money when fresh before.

selections.name: Iron Fury
selections.reason: Talented gelding who returns with two trials. Strong form last campaign including a 2nd at Gosford.

selections.name: Too Darn Finesse
selections.reason: Second run back. Nicely placed from the inside gate and expected to go well.

selections.name: Very Sirius
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. 3rd at Canberra and 2nd at Goulburn recently. Deep into the prep.

selections.name: Copperline
selections.reason: Dual acceptor. Promising type who won at this track last start.

danger_horse.name: Zealands Princess
danger_horse.reason: Won at Dubbo last start and has a low gate. One of the chances again.

selections.name: Saintly Sands
selections.reason: Scored a big 5 len win at Warren last start. Hard to stop after the latest victory.

selections.name: Ocean Tsunami (NZ)
selections.reason: Third-up today. 2nd at Newcastle recently and drops in grade. Shapes as the main danger.

selections.name: Autumn Heir
selections.reason: Fitter now and can make amends after a 5th at Newcastle. Won at Ipswich previously.

selections.name: Crown Legend
selections.reason: Returns from a let-up. Nicely placed to atone after a 3rd at Bathurst two back.

danger_horse.name: Exorbitant Miss
danger_horse.reason: 2nd at Warren last start and won at Quirindi prior. Consistent form.

selections.name: Wave Breaker
selections.reason: Tough sprinting mare who won at Dubbo last start. Inside draw is a major plus.

selections.name: Hellcibell
selections.reason: Tracked the speed for 2nd at this track last start. Capable on her day and hard to beat on the back-up.

selections.name: Not Written Off
selections.reason: Second run back. 2nd at Muswellbrook last start. Right in the mix with her good second-up record.

selections.name: Up The Front
selections.reason: Talented gelding who ran 2nd at Kembla Grange last start. Can go one better today.

danger_horse.name: Boambee Beach
danger_horse.reason: Scored a big 3.5 len win at Coffs Harbour. Impressive win last start and must be kept safe.

selections.name: Pepperina
selections.reason: Won by 0.7 len at Muswellbrook last start. Progressive filly who can bounce back quickly.

selections.name: Ode So Much
selections.reason: 3rd at Parkes last start and 2nd at Warren prior. Ticks a few boxes today from a good gate.

selections.name: Jason Darren
selections.reason: 2nd at Muswellbrook last start. Kept up to the mark with a trial win and don't dismiss.

selections.name: Magurtz
selections.reason: Made ground for 2nd at Gunnedah last start. Racing well and ready to show his best.

danger_horse.name: Extreme Merger
danger_horse.reason: Won at Parkes last start. Back in the winners' list and rates among the leading hopes.
